de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics

Class Constraint.Top

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.Constraint.Top
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Constraint
    Enclosing interface:
    Constraint
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public static class Constraint.Top
extends Object
implements Constraint
    Constraint class for representating the TOP (unsatisfiable) constraint.

    • Method Detail

      • isSatisfiable

        public boolean isSatisfiable()
        Deprecated. 
        is an unsatisfiable Constraint satisfiable? NO.
        Specified by:
        isSatisfiable in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        always false

      • getInstantiation

        public Term getInstantiation(Metavariable p_mv,
                    TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        Specified by:
        getInstantiation in interface Constraint
        services - TODO
        Returns:
        Find a term the given metavariable can be instantiated with which is consistent with every instantiation that satisfies this constraint (that means, the term such an instantiation substitutes the metavariable with can always be unified with the returned term).

      • unify

        public Constraint unify(Term t1,
               Term t2,
               TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        adding new constraints to an unsatisfiable constraint results in an unsatisfiable constraint so this one is returned
        Specified by:
        unify in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        t1 - Term to be unified
        t2 - Term to be unified
        services - the Services providing access to the type model the parameter may be null but then the unification fails (i.e. @link Constraint#TOP is returned) when accessing the type model (e.g. for introducing intersection sorts) would be necessary).
        Returns:
        always this

      • unify

        public Constraint unify(Term t1,
               Term t2,
               TermServices services,
               BooleanContainer unchanged)
        Deprecated. 
        Description copied from interface: Constraint
        tries to unify terms t1 and t2.
        Specified by:
        unify in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        t1 - Term to be unfied
        t2 - Term to be unfied
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        unchanged - true iff the new constraint equals this one
        Returns:
        TOP if not possible, else a new constraint with after unification of t1 and t2

      • equals

        public boolean equals(Object obj)
        Deprecated. 
        Description copied from interface: Constraint
        checks equality of constraints
        Specified by:
        equals in interface Constraint
        Overrides:
        equals in class Object

      • isAsStrongAs

        public boolean isAsStrongAs(Constraint co)
        Deprecated. 
        Specified by:
        isAsStrongAs in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        true iff this constraint is as strong as "co", i.e. every instantiation satisfying "this" also satisfies "co".

      • isAsWeakAs

        public boolean isAsWeakAs(Constraint co)
        Deprecated. 
        Specified by:
        isAsWeakAs in interface Constraint
        Returns:
        true iff this constraint is as weak as "co", i.e. every instantiation satisfying "co" also satisfies "this".

      • join

        public Constraint join(Constraint co,
              TermServices services)
        Deprecated. 
        joint of Top and co is Top
        Specified by:
        join in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        co - Constraint to be joined with this one
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        Returns:
        this

      • join

        public Constraint join(Constraint co,
              TermServices services,
              BooleanContainer c)
        Deprecated. 
        joint of Top and co is Top and Top subsumes every constraint
        Specified by:
        join in interface Constraint
        Parameters:
        co - Constraint to be joined with this one
        services - the Services providing access to the type model
        c - the BooleanContainers value set true, if this constraint is as strong as co
        Returns:
        this
